extDescription.message: Prepare a video link and open a free chat (Video Fact-Check GPT, Gemini, Claude, Copilot, or DeepSeek) — no setup needed.

sidepanelSubtitle.message: We prepare the link and captions. One tap opens the chat and starts the check.

guideIdle.message: Scan a video page first — then choose a chat and open it.

guideReady.message: Choose a chat (sign in first — see help below), then tap Open chat.

guideOpenedPaste.message: $1$ is open — paste with Ctrl+V, then send.

guideInjectOk.message: Text inserted and sent. The answer appears in the chat.

guideInjectFailed.message: Automatic insert failed. Click the chat box, press Ctrl+V, then send.

guideLoginChat.message: Please sign in to $1$ in the open tab, then tap Open chat again.

guideTabOpenFailed.message: Could not open the chat tab. Check pop-up blockers, then try again.

sidepanelHint.message: First create a free account and sign in to your chosen chat. Then use Open chat here.

hintAfterCopy.message: The chat opens. We insert the text there when possible.

hintInjecting.message: One moment — inserting and sending the text in the chat.

hintPasteNow.message: Click the chat box, press Ctrl+V, then send. You must already be signed in.

hintLoginRequired.message: Sign in in the open tab (use the help links below if needed), then Open chat again. The text stays on the clipboard.

hintTabOpenFailed.message: Allow pop-ups for this extension, or open the chat yourself and paste (Ctrl+V).

hintCopyFailed.message: Could not copy — tap Copy again, then paste in the chat.

handoffOpenedPaste.message: $1$ is open — paste with Ctrl+V, then send (text is on the clipboard).

handoffInjectFailed.message: Insert failed — please Ctrl+V in the chat and send (text is on the clipboard).

handoffLoginChat.message: Sign in to $1$ first, then tap Open chat again.

handoffTabOpenFailed.message: Chat tab did not open — check pop-up blockers and try again (text is on the clipboard).

copyOk.message: Copied. Choose a chat and open it, or paste yourself.

copyAgainOk.message: Copied again. Paste in the chat (Ctrl+V).

readAnswerScore.message: Look for a score from 1 to 10 (1 = very unreliable, 10 = well supported).

readAnswerTraffic.message: Quick guide: 1–3 caution, 4–6 mixed, 7–10 mostly reliable.

readAnswerSources.message: Check the listed sources and any notes about what is still uncertain.

captureIdle.message: Open a video page, then tap Scan page.

captureWorking.message: Looking for the video link and captions…

captureUnsupported.message: No supported video site detected. You can still copy the page link or paste your own transcript.

captureFailed.message: Could not read this page. Try again on YouTube, TikTok, X, Facebook, or Instagram.

captionsNo.message: No — chat can still use the link

captionsExternalHint.message: Captions fetched with a free helper (video link only; no audio upload).

manualHelp.message: If captions are missing, paste text here. We will include it when you open the chat.

manualSaved.message: Transcript saved for the next chat open.

loginHelpHeading.message: Before you start — free account & sign-in

loginHelpIntro.message: This extension does not create accounts. You need a free account with the chat you choose, and you must be signed in before the fact-check can run. Open a link below to register or sign in:

loginHelpInjectNote.message: we can insert and send when you are signed in

loginHelpPasteNote.message: paste with Ctrl+V (auto-insert not available yet)

loginHelpPaste.message: DeepSeek: after Open chat, click the message box, press Ctrl+V, then send. ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, and Microsoft Copilot: we try to insert and send automatically — still sign in first.

optionsSubtitle.message: Choose your default chat, text size, transcript option, and whether to keep the last video.

fontSizeHelp.message: Large makes buttons and steps easier to read. You can also zoom the page in Chrome.

labelRememberPackage.message: Remember last video after Chrome restarts

rememberPackageHelp.message: Optional. Stores the last link and transcript on this computer only — never sent to us. Turn off to clear it.

enableTranscriptHelp.message: When off, only the video link is prepared. You can still paste a transcript yourself in the side panel.

hintCancelled.message: You can scan again or open the chat when you are ready.

handoffMultipromptInject.message: Inserting part $1 of $2 into the chat…

handoffMultipromptPaste.message: Part $1 of $2 is on the clipboard — paste and send, then tap Copy again for the next part.

hintPasteMultiprompt.message: Paste part $1 of $2 into the chat, send it, then use Copy again for the next part. The last part starts the fact-check.
